name: Ovyro build state and how to run it
description: Milestone as of this session: Phase 0 (foundation: Next.js 15 + Drizzle full spec-6 schema + Better Auth additive roles + BullMQ worker) and Phase 1 (listings-core, seller CRUD+wizard, R2 media pipeline, public browse/search + SSR detail with OG, admin moderation+emails+expiry) are COMPLETE, merged to main, verified end-to-end (Phase 1.5: 182 tests, lifecycle 31/31 on real Postgres). Deployed to Railway project ovyro (web + worker + Postgres + Redis) at web-production-a13c7.up.railway.app. LOCAL DEV: run bash scripts/dev-setup.sh then bun run dev, open localhost:3000 and /land — seed-demo.ts inserts 8 active demo listings (demo seller seller@ovyro.local password DemoSeller#2026) so browse/filters/FTS/detail render without R2. Cloud integrations inert without creds: R2 media upload, Twilio phone OTP, Resend email, Meta pixel. Next phase ready: Phase 2 buyer core (phone OTP, inquiry/lead pipeline, lists, buyer profile) OVYRO-a421. Workflow: iterate locally, then push main to GitHub hrubee/OVYRO. Coordinator cannot git push (hook-blocked); human runs the push.
